creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed

I committed an update to the port to unbreak it, as well as to let it use  
newer distfile and patch. 

Due mainly to the security problems with this port, I have been reluctant  
to update this port.  I also have considered removing the port. 
However, the facts that as the bundled editor provides Japanese input  
support, and Japanese help files are provided occurred to me as  
a value for some people, and thus, decided to keep it. 

I apologize for my reluctance and the resulting delay.
